import functools

class LazyProperty:
    """
    Decorator to make a property lazy. The decorated method will be called
    only on the first access, and its result will be cached and returned
    for subsequent accesses.
    """
    def __init__(self, func):
        self.func = func
        functools.update_wrapper(self, func)

    def __get__(self, obj, objtype=None):
        if obj is None:
            return self  # Accessed via class, return the descriptor itself
        
        # Calculate the value
        value = self.func(obj)
        
        # Store the value on the instance, replacing the descriptor
        setattr(obj, self.func.__name__, value)
        
        return value
